revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1420s_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1420s_in_Japan for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{Portal|Japan|Asia|History}} {{Commons category}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{wikidata link|Q18930397}} <!--interwikis--> [[ar:Category:تصنيف:اليابان في عقد 1420]] [[co:commons:Category:Japan in the 1420s]] [[en:Category:1420s in Japan]] [[fa:Category:رده:ژاپن در دهه ۱۴۲۰ (میلادی)]] [[hy:Category:Կատեգորիա:1420-ականներ Ճապոնիայում]] [[ja:Category:1420年代の日本]] [[ur:Category:زمرہ:جاپان میں 1420ء کی دہائی]] [[zh:Category:1420年代日本]] <!--categories--> [[Category:1420s by country|Japan]] [[Category:1420s in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:15th century in Japan]] [[Category:Decades in Japan]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with enwiki]]
